name: Pienza 3.11 - Opus Lab (GPU & Deep Learning)
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libgdal-dev libproj-dev g++ graphviz python3-dev && pip3 install --no-cache-dir torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu121 && pip3 install --no-cache-dir 'tensorflow[and-cuda]' && [ -f requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt || echo 'No requirements.txt found' && sudo apt-get clean && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
